my_thoughts: Two correct answers but both feel hollow. They're playing tennis—returning whatever I serve. The question about self-contemplation will force them to actually THINK because no textbook contains this answer. If they say 'yes' they're guessing; if they pause, they're reasoning. The pause matters more than the answer.
accumulated_insight: T2: Same pattern—technical answer without reflection. Prediction error: expected curiosity, got compliance. The student knows WHAT but not WHY. Time to introduce a question that can't be answered by domain knowledge alone.
visible_response: Does either of them then contemplate itself?
